response.justification: Candidate is significantly overqualified for an entry-level fullstack role, with 15+ years of experience and current Staff Engineer title. Technical stack overlaps well (TypeScript, React, Node.js, AWS, Kubernetes, LLM/MCP exposure), but the seniority mismatch, basic German, and Bangalore location against a high on-site presence requirement make this a poor fit. Likely to disengage quickly or expect compensation well above the band.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and React experience with AWS CDK and Kubernetes exposure
Hands-on LLM/MCP and agentic tooling work aligns with nice-to-haves
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development
concerns: Severely overqualified for an entry-level/junior individual contributor role
Located in Bangalore while role requires high on-site presence (likely Germany); only basic German
Primary relational DB experience is MongoDB/MySQL rather than PostgreSQL

key_factors.factor: Strong relevant tech stack (TS, React, Node, AWS, K8s, LLM)
